extracted_items.content: CI/CD pipeline uses GitHub Actions with stages: lint → test → build docker image → push to GHCR → deploy to Fly.io. Deployment to Fly.io only runs on main branch.
Test matrix must validate Python 3.11 and 3.12 compatibility. Both versions are actively supported.
Frontend stack: Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript only (no plain JavaScript files allowed).
Frontend design system uses shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS. MUI and Chakra are explicitly rejected.
API rate limiting strategy: per-user tiered limits with 100 requests per minute for free tier and 1000 for paid tier.
Rate limiting implemented using Redis with sliding window algorithm. Redis instance is shared with job queue.
Feature flag naming convention: {team}_{feature_name}_{state} where state is 'enabled', 'disabled', or 'rollout'. Example: payments_new_checkout_enabled.
Feature flag management uses LaunchDarkly. The {team}_{feature_name}_{state} naming convention must be enforced within LaunchDarkly.
